Black-and-white feather star

Kingdom Animalia

Updated Oct 2016

Where seen?

This elegant black-and-white feather star is sometimes seen, on coral rubble and near living reefs on undisturbed shores.

Features

10-12cm in diameter with arms. Black pinnules on pale arms. More than 20 arms. On the upperside, the central disk is covered with many dark to black pinnules. The cirri on the underside is banded.

Beting Bronok, Aug 05
Underside
Close-up look at arms.
Raffles Lighthouse, Jun 07
Fine feeding tentacles on pinnules.

*Species are difficult to positively identify without close examination. On this website, they are grouped by large external features for convenience of display .

Black-and-white feathers stars on Singapore shores
